page.title: Signing keys
page.description: The token-signing keyset published in the JWKS that resource servers use to verify Qeet ID access and ID tokens.

notice: Key rotation is performed operationally (see deploy runbook), not from the dashboard. New keys are introduced as <activeState>active</activeState> while retiring keys stay published as <retiredState>retired</retiredState> long enough for in-flight tokens to expire.
